objective: Implement deterministic review bundles, evidence delta packets, and suggestion envelopes for the staff shell without granting suggestion output any mutation authority.
authoritativeSourceSections: prompt/shared_operating_contract_228_to_235.md#5.8 `235` implements review-bundle assembly and suggestion seams
forbiddenLocalShortcuts: Do not let suggestion output become the mutation authority.
Do not derive summary parity from local UI formatting or route state.
Do not silently keep stale bundles live after duplicate or epoch invalidation.
mandatoryTests: same evidence set yields deterministic bundle summary and delta packet
duplicate reversal invalidates stale bundle and forces rebuild
DecisionEpoch supersession invalidates stale preview-coupled bundle outputs
suggestion envelope remains clearly non-authoritative in API contracts and settlement paths
failClosedConditions: Missing required evidence family blocks bundle issuance.
Missing provenance for any summary section blocks visible bundle publication.
Attempt to settle suggestion output as an authoritative mutation blocks completion.
temporarySeams: Expose bundle and suggestion interfaces through the domain kernel first so later consequence tracks can integrate without coupling to frontend-specific shapes.
